item.title: Rosenior hails ‘world class’ Joao Pedro after hattrick crushes Villa
item.description:
Source: FMT Sports (Sports)

item.title: Travel chaos threatens Iraq’s participation in World Cup playoffs
item.description:
Source: FMT Sports (Sports)
The Iraqis are scheduled to play the winners of an earlier tie between Bolivia and Suriname in Monterrey on March 31 but are concerned they might not be able to get everyone to Mexico.
